cookie.title: We respect your cookie choices
cookie.desc: We use cookies to keep RouYou running and to improve it. Strictly necessary cookies can't be turned off; the rest are up to you.
cookie.necessaryDesc: Required for sign-in, security and payments — can't be turned off
cookie.preferencesDesc: Remembers your language, theme and draft preferences
cookie.analyticsDesc: Anonymous usage stats to improve the product
cookie.advertisingDesc: We don't run ads today; this is a placeholder
